title: Fix Dashboard card navigation and display owner/complaint on card

requirements.summary: Fix the click handler on CalendarCaseCard so that clicking a card on the Dashboard correctly sets the targetCaseId state in App.tsx and navigates the user to the Cases page, scrolling to and highlighting the corresponding case card.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking any CalendarCaseCard on the Dashboard navigates the user to the Cases page.
The Cases page scrolls to and highlights the case that was clicked.
The targetCaseId prop/state is correctly passed from CalendarCaseCard up through DashboardPage to App.tsx, triggering the page switch.
Navigation works for all cases visible on the Dashboard calendar.

file_operations.description: Add an onClick handler to the card wrapper that calls the onCaseClick callback prop with the case's caseId. Ensure the entire card is clickable and that the click propagates the caseId to the parent DashboardPage component.

Add a new prop onCaseClick that receives a case ID and forwards it to the parent App.tsx. Pass this callback down to each CalendarCaseCard component rendered in the calendar grid so that clicks bubble up properly.

Add a handleCaseClick callback function that sets the targetCaseId state and switches the current page to 'cases'. Pass this callback as the onCaseClick prop to the DashboardPage component so that clicking a calendar card triggers navigation and highlights the target case on the Cases page.

requirements.summary: Display the owner name and presenting complaint (from the VetCase data) on each CalendarCaseCard on the Dashboard, in addition to the existing pet name, MRN, and species/sex information.
acceptanceCriteria: Each CalendarCaseCard shows the owner name if it is available on the case.
Each CalendarCaseCard shows the presenting complaint if it is available on the case.
Owner name and presenting complaint are legible and fit within the compact card layout without breaking the calendar grid.
If owner name or presenting complaint is absent for a case, those fields are gracefully omitted or shown as empty.

file_operations.description: Add two new text display elements to the card layout: one for the owner name (case.ownerLastName) and one for the presenting complaint (case.presentingComplaint). Position these fields below the existing pet name/MRN/species/sex information. Apply conditional rendering or fallback empty strings if these fields are missing. Ensure the typography and spacing fit within the compact card without overflowing the calendar grid cell.
